documentation.description:
This package contains the routines for supporting the Image attribute for
ordinary fixed point types up to 32-bit small and mantissa.

subprograms.name: Image_Fixed32
Set_Image_Fixed32

generic_instantiations.name: Impl
generic_instantiations.code: package Impl is new Image_F (Int32, Uns32, Arith_32.Scaled_Divide32);
